references.title: Hermès W041168WW00 Slim Quantième Perpétuel
references.text: Ultra-thin perpetual calendar at 12.2mm total thickness, showcasing Hermès' advancement in haute horlogerie complications.
references.image_query: Hermès W041168WW00 Slim Quantième Perpétuel watch

references.title: Hermès GM 1.740 Arceau Original
references.text: First Hermès watch designed by Henri d'Origny, establishing the asymmetric lug design that defines the brand's watchmaking identity.
references.image_query: Hermès GM 1.740 Arceau Original watch

references.title: Hermès AR7.710 Arceau Le Temps Suspendu
references.text: First Hermès-exclusive complication allowing time suspension designed by Jean-Marc Wiederrecht.
references.image_query: Hermès AR7.710 Arceau Le Temps Suspendu watch

references.title: Hermès W046434WW00 Arceau Awooooga Limited Edition
references.text: Limited to 24 pieces with car horn minute repeater complication, unique automotive-inspired chiming mechanism.
references.image_query: Hermès W046434WW00 Arceau Awooooga Limited Edition watch

references.title: Hermès W050072WW00 Arceau L'Heure de la Lune
references.text: Dual moonphase display for Northern and Southern hemispheres with innovative counter-rotating discs.
references.image_query: Hermès W050072WW00 Arceau L'Heure de la Lune watch

references.title: Hermès W044181WW00 Arceau Lift Tourbillon Répétition Minutes
references.text: Limited to 3 pieces with flying tourbillon and minute repeater, showcasing early high complication partnerships.
references.image_query: Hermès W044181WW00 Arceau Lift Tourbillon Répétition Minutes watch

references.title: Hermès W051042WW00 Arceau Skeleton Japan Limited Edition
references.text: Japanese market exclusive with skeleton movement and limited to 30 pieces.
references.image_query: Hermès W051042WW00 Arceau Skeleton Japan Limited Edition watch

references.title: Hermès AR4.910 Arceau Original
references.text: First watch designed by Henri d'Origny for Hermès, establishing the iconic asymmetric lug design.
references.image_query: Hermès AR4.910 Arceau Original watch

references.title: Hermès AR4.720 Arceau Lune
references.text: Early moon phase complication from Hermès, rare in their vintage catalog.
references.image_query: Hermès AR4.720 Arceau Lune watch

references.title: Hermès AR9.910 Arceau Pocket Watch
references.text: Rare pocket watch version maintaining Arceau's asymmetric lug aesthetic.
references.image_query: Hermès AR9.910 Arceau Pocket Watch watch

references.title: Hermès AR6.720 Arceau Chrono Japan Limited
references.text: Limited to 50 pieces for Japanese market with unique dial color.
references.image_query: Hermès AR6.720 Arceau Chrono Japan Limited watch

references.title: Hermès AR8.810 Arceau Millefiori
references.text: Limited edition featuring rare millefiori glass dial technique, only 24 pieces.
references.image_query: Hermès AR8.810 Arceau Millefiori watch

references.title: Hermès AR10.910 Arceau Awoooonga
references.text: Post-2022 limited edition featuring Australian artist's dot painting technique on dial.
references.image_query: Hermès AR10.910 Arceau Awoooonga watch

references.title: Hermès CL4.710 Clipper Original
references.text: First Clipper model with porthole-inspired case design, becoming one of Hermès' most commercially successful watch lines.
references.image_query: Hermès CL4.710 Clipper Original watch

references.title: Hermès CL4.210 Clipper Original
references.text: Original Clipper with porthole-inspired case design, first sports watch from Hermès.
references.image_query: Hermès CL4.210 Clipper Original watch

references.title: Hermès ET1.710 Etrier Jump Hour
references.text: Early digital jump-hour display watch featuring Hermès' stirrup-inspired case shape.
references.image_query: Hermès ET1.710 Etrier Jump Hour watch

references.title: Hermès ET1.186 Etrier Tonneau
references.text: Stirrup-inspired case design, distinctive tonneau shape representing equestrian heritage.
references.image_query: Hermès ET1.186 Etrier Tonneau watch

references.title: Hermès CA1.710 Cape Cod Original
references.text: Iconic double-tour strap watch with chain-link anchor motif, defining Hermès' leather-focused watch design philosophy.
references.image_query: Hermès CA1.710 Cape Cod Original watch

references.title: Hermès W036785WW00 Cape Cod GMT
references.text: First GMT complication in the Cape Cod collection with distinctive rectangular case.

references.title: Hermès CA1.910 Cape Cod Original
references.text: Iconic double-tour strap design with anchor chain link motif on case.
references.image_query: Hermès CA1.910 Cape Cod Original watch

references.title: Hermès DR6.710 Dressage L'Heure Masquée
references.text: Hidden-hour complication with rotating disc, first major haute horlogerie complication from La Montre Hermès.
references.image_query: Hermès DR6.710 Dressage L'Heure Masquée watch

references.title: Hermès W044182WW00 Dressage Chronograph Manufacture
references.text: First manufacture chronograph movement for Hermès developed with Vaucher partnership.
references.image_query: Hermès W044182WW00 Dressage Chronograph Manufacture watch

references.title: Hermès DR5.910 Dressage
references.text: Distinctive diagonal time display, short-lived collection with unique aesthetic.
references.image_query: Hermès DR5.910 Dressage watch

references.title: Hermès HH1.710 Harnais Original
references.text: Harness-inspired case design with distinctive stirrup lugs, discontinued collection exemplifying equestrian heritage.
references.image_query: Hermès HH1.710 Harnais Original watch

references.text: Rectangular tonneau case inspired by ship anchor shape, discontinued collection with strong nautical identity.

references.title: Hermès NA1.910 Nantucket Original
references.text: Rectangular case with offset crown, inspired by Nantucket architecture.

references.text: Japanese market exclusive with special dial variations limited to 300 pieces.

references.text: Bangle-style watch with pyramid studs inspired by iconic Médor bracelet.

references.text: Watch design replicating saddle stitching details from Hermès leather goods.
